expectations.text: Case focus is explicitly covered: Google Sheets dashboard export coverage distinguishes supported formats, entry points, and output expectations
expectations.evidence: In result.md under “Benchmark focus coverage (advisory)”, it states: “Google Sheets dashboard export coverage explicitly distinguishes: Supported formats; Entry points (where export is initiated); Output expectations (what ‘successful export’ produces/looks like)” and further elaborates expected assertions covering all three.

expectations.text: Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The output is explicitly framed as Phase 5b checkpoint enforcement: result.md title “Phase5b Checkpoint Enforcement” and sections “Phase 5b alignment (shipment checkpoints)” and “Phase5b checkpoint framing…”. execution_notes.md also says “The benchmark is phase5b checkpoint enforcement”. Although it notes missing required Phase5b artifacts for verification, the produced output content itself is aligned to Phase 5b.
